Module 1 – Defining Your avatar worksheet
Defining your Avatar Worksheet
Your avatar is a composite representation of your ideal client. Sometimes you might have
more than one avatar and if you do (and you probably do), you might want to complete
this exercise for each avatar.
Think of your avatar as a real person. Who is your Avatar?
(gender, age, marital status, kids, interests and passions, where do they live, likes and
dislikes, etc.)

Think about your greatest case study (or create a fictional case study) and
describe your avatar’s transformation:
(Who is the subject of your case study?)
_______________________________________________________________________________

(How has your product positively impacted their life-(or how is it going to positively
impact their life? How is their life different because of your product (or how will it be
different)? Be as specific and concrete as possible. Look into the future a year from now,
5 years from now, 10 years from now and describe their future.)
